Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BEST CORNER LLC's Motion To Strike is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property, to be heard on the same date and time. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Plaintiff'S Motion To Strike Coss Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Daniel Piccinini for Plaintiff Best Corner, LLC / No Appearance by the Defendant.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff'S Motion To Strike Coss Complaint is GRANTED, with leave to amend. Cross-Complaint is stricken from answer. Defendant shall file its cross-complaint, if any, within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
